subject: A young woman with long dark hair in FFIX CG render style, labeled Summoner on the card — visual matches Garnet til Alexandros XVII (Dagger) from Final Fantasy IX
suspected_ip: Garnet til Alexandros XVII / Dagger (Final Fantasy IX)
description: A close-up portrait of a young woman rendered in the CG art style of Final Fantasy IX. She has long, straight dark hair framing a youthful face with large expressive eyes. Her gaze is directed slightly off-center with a calm, serious expression. She wears layered cloth garments visible at the shoulders and collar. A forest or jungle background is visible behind her — green vines and leaves blurred out of focus. The palette is natural greens and browns in the background contrasting with the warmer skin tones of the subject. The card explicitly labels her as a Summoner from Final Fantasy IX, and her appearance is consistent with the well-known FFIX protagonist Garnet.
foreground: Young dark-haired woman in layered cloth garments, calm expression
background: Forest/jungle greenery — vines and leaves, soft focus
emotion: Calm and composed; direct but slightly-averted gaze, serene expression
